OmniScript.description: Allows candidates to provide their personal and contact details.
OmniScript.name: TrialManagement_CandidateRegistration

omniProcessElements.name: CandidateAccountOrLeadDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.CandidateAccountOrLeadDetails", "integrationProcedureKey" : "TrialManagement_GetCandidateAccountOrLeadDetails", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "LeadOrAccountId" : "%LeadOrAccountId%" }, "inProgressMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.InProgress", "postMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Done", "failureNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Continue", "failureAbortLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Abort", "failureGoBackLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.GoBack", "failureAbortMessage" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.AreYouSure", "validationRequired" : "Step", "redirectPageName" : "", "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "svgSprite" : "", "svgIcon" : "", "errorMessage" : { "custom" : [ ], "default" : null }, "enableDefaultAbort" : false, "enableActionMessage" : false, "businessCategory" : "", "businessEvent" : "", "sendOnlyExtraPayload" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: CandidateRegistrationRequiredIds
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.CandidateRegistrationRequiredIds", "elementValueMap" : { "AuthorizationFormTextId" : "0cNWs0000000MOjMAM", "RecordTypeId" : "012Ws0000008CthIAE" }, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : false, "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false }

omniProcessElements.name: ExecuteCandidateRegistration
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 4, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.ExecuteCandidateRegistration", "integrationProcedureKey" : "TrialManagement_ExecuteCandidateRegistration", "useContinuation" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "useFuture" : false, "chainable" : false }, "remoteTimeout" : 30000, "preTransformBundle" : "", "postTransformBundle" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "extraPayload" : { "Salutation" : "%Salutation%", "FirstName" : "%FirstName%", "LastName" : "%LastName%", "Country" : "%Country%", "PostalCode" : "%PostalCode%", "Email" : "%Email%", "Phone" : "%Phone%", "InterestedInOtherTrials" : "%InterestedInOtherTrials%", "ResearchStudyId" : "%ResearchStudyId%", "AuthorizationFormTextId" : "%AuthorizationFormTextId%", "RecordTypeId" : "%RecordTypeId%", "SiteKeyDeveloperName" : "%SiteCaptchaAPIKeyPairNickName%", "CaptchaToken" : "%Captcha:response%", "CaptchaType" : "Recaptcha", "LeadOrAccountId" : "%LeadOrAccountId%", "EncryptedLeadOrAccountId" : "redirectTemplateUrl" : "vlcAcknowledge.html", "redirectNextLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Next", "redirectNextWidth" : 3, "redirectPreviousLabel" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Previous", "redirectPreviousWidth" : 3, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "show" : null, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "wpm" : false, "ssm" : childElements.name: Country
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : null, "placeholder" : "", "maxLength" : 255, "minLength" : 0, "ptrnErrText" : "", "pattern" : "", "mask" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Country", "controlWidth" : 6 }

childElements.name: Email
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dataType" : null, "mask" : null, "show" : null, "hide" : true, "expression" : "IF(%NewCandidateOrLeadEmail% == NULL, %ExistingLeadOrAccountEmail%, %NewCandidateOrLeadEmail%)", "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.EmailFormula", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: ExistingLeadOrAccountEmail
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "field" : "IsDecryptedIdValid", "condition" : "=", "data" : "true" } ] } }, "placeholder" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "pattern" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : true, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : true, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Email", "controlWidth" : 6 }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "autocomplete" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "hide" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "debounceValue" : 0, "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "field" : "IsDecryptedIdValid", "condition" : "=", "data" : "true" } ] } }, "placeholder" : "", "maxLength" : 255, "minLength" : 0, "ptrnErrText" : "", "pattern" : "", "mask" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "helpText" : "", "help" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "readOnly" : true, "repeatLimit" : null, "repeatClone" : false, "repeat" : false, "required" : true, "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.LastName", "controlWidth" : 5 }

childElements.name: IneligibleOrExistingLeadOrAccountConsent
InterestedInOtherTrials
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 12, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.RegisterForFutureTrials", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "expression" : "IF(%NewEligibleCandidateConsent% == NULL, true, %NewEligibleCandidateConsent%)", "hide" : true, "show" : null, "mask" : null, "dataType" : null, "hideGroupSep" : false, "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LastName
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "hideGroupSep" : false, "dataType" : null, "mask" : null, "show" : null, "hide" : true, "expression" : "IF(%NewCandidateOrLeadLastName% == NULL, %ExistingLeadOrAccountLastName%, %NewCandidateOrLeadLastName%)", "inputWidth" : 12, "showInputWidth" : false, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.LastNameFormula", "controlWidth" : 12 }

childElements.name: NewCandidateOrLeadEmail
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "controlWidth" : 6, "label" : "$standardLabel.LifeSciencesOmnistudioComponents.Email", "showInputWidth" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "required" : true, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "readOnly" : false, "defaultValue" : null, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "pattern" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "placeholder" : "", "show" : { "group" : { "operator" : "AND", "rules" : [ { "data" : "true", "condition" : "<>", "field" : "IsDecryptedIdValid" } ] } }, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "debounceValue" : 0, "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "hide" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "autocomplete" : null }
